title: Banshee Rogue Work In Progress
description: Rising stars Steph Cassin and Oro Rose join forces for a split bill of work in progress comedy. Expect cerebral mischief. In an all-new work in progress show - 'Banshee', Steph Cassin explores her fascination with horror films and her complicated relationship with all things supernatural. A Komedia New Comedy Award Finalist 2024 and West End New Women Act of the Year Finalist 2025, Steph Cassin blends her dry wit with her agricultural background with hilarious results. “A very effective piece of world-building” – Chortle ------------ Oro Rose presents a work-in-progress for their debut show: 'Rogue'. Oro asks: Why is your name your name? Are we all gay now? And if all our heroes are wrong 'uns, what does that make us? 'So You Think You're Funny?' Finalist - 2025 'Leicester Comedian of the Year' Nominee - 2026 "Oro is a non-binary stand-up act that gently had us roaring with laughter...This is an act to look out for." Latest Brighton, July 2025
